name: dspy-agent-skill
description: 构建 complex AI systems with declarative programming, optimize prompts automatically, create modular RAG systems and agents with DSPy - Stanford NLP's framework for systematic LM programming
intent_triggers: 我需要處理 dspy 相關工作
幫我啟用 dspy 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 dspy

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

examples.intent: Use the dspy skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
